name: xmldiffandpatch
description: Generates and applies RFC 5261-compatible XML patch files using XPath selectors. Watches modified XML files and automatically produces diffs on save.

xmlDiffAndPatch.originalFolder.description: Path to the folder containing the original (vanilla/baseline) XML files. Always required.

xmlDiffAndPatch.folderPairs.description: List of folder pairs to process. Each pair defines a modifiedFolder, diffFolder, and optional pathPrefix. At least one valid pair is required.

modifiedFolder.description: Path to the folder holding modified XML files. Use '.' for the workspace folder. Must differ from diffFolder.

diffFolder.description: Path to the folder holding diff XML files. Must differ from modifiedFolder.

pathPrefix.description: Sub-path inserted between originalFolder and the file's relative path when looking up the original file (e.g. 'libraries').

xmlDiffAndPatch.xsdPath.description: Path to diff.xsd for output validation. Relative paths resolve from workspace root.

xmlDiffAndPatch.onlyFullPath.description: If true, always generate full absolute XPath (no // shorthand).

xmlDiffAndPatch.useAllAttributes.description: If true, include all attributes in XPath predicates regardless of uniqueness.

xmlDiffAndPatch.ignoreDiffInAttribute.description: Attribute name to ignore when comparing elements (e.g. 'version'). null = no attribute ignored.

xmlDiffAndPatch.reflectDiffToModified.description: If true (default), saves in diffFolder are also processed: the diff is applied to the original to regenerate the modified file.

xmlDiffAndPatch.passOtherFiles.description: If true (default), files not found in originalFolder by relative path are copied as-is to the output folder.

xmlDiffAndPatch.showDiffEditorOnSave.description: If true, open a side-by-side diff editor after generating a diff file. (v0.2 feature)

xmlDiffAndPatch.allowDoubles.description: If true, skip duplicate-element guard when applying <add> operations during patch.

enumDescriptions: Trigger processing only on explicit VS Code save (Ctrl+S).
Trigger processing on any file-system change, with debounce.
Disable automatic watching entirely; use only the explorer context menu commands.

xmlDiffAndPatch.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for 'onTheFly' watch mode.

enumDescriptions: Write the empty diff file to the output folder.
Delete the output file if it already exists (silent).
Log a warning but leave any existing output file in place.
Log a warning and delete the output file if it already exists.
xmlDiffAndPatch.emptyDiffBehavior.description: Action when diff produces no operations (the saved file is identical to the original).

enumDescriptions: Log a warning but still write the diff file.
Log an error and skip writing the diff file.
xmlDiffAndPatch.validationFailBehavior.description: Action when structural validation of a generated diff file fails.

xmlDiffAndPatch.debug.description: Enable verbose debug logging in the X4DiffAndPatch output channel.
